name: Contribution request
about: Request permission and guidance to contribute code or documentation (CLA/DCO required)
title: 'Contribution request: [short summary]'
labels: contribution

---

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Mana! Please fill out the details below so maintainers can review your request.

## Summary
Provide a short summary of the change or feature you propose:


## Motivation
Why is this change needed? Describe the problem it solves or the improvement it provides.


## Scope & Approach
Describe the scope of work (small bugfix / feature / docs) and your high-level approach. Include any non-obvious design choices.


## Files / Areas Affected
List the files or areas you expect to change (e.g., `node-bot/`, `desktop-client/renderer/`):


## Contribution agreement
Which contribution agreement do you prefer?
- [ ] CLA (I will sign the CLA and email it to yuuzulight@gmail.com)
- [ ] DCO (I will sign my commits with `Signed-off-by` lines)

If CLA: please review `CLA.md` and email a signed copy to yuuzulight@gmail.com. If DCO: include `Signed-off-by: Your Name <you@example.com>` in your commit messages.

## Additional notes
Any other context, links to related issues, or test data.


Once you submit this issue, a maintainer will review and reply with next steps or an invitation to submit code under the chosen agreement.
